encounter.reason: Initial hematology consultation for antiphospholipid syndrome evaluation and thrombophilia screening

document_references.description: Initial hematology consultation documenting comprehensive evaluation for suspected antiphospholipid syndrome in the setting of recurrent pregnancy loss. Includes detailed review of prior OB/GYN records and APS antibody results, independent clinical assessment noting the obstetric versus thrombotic APS distinction, discussion of weakly positive lupus anticoagulant and borderline anti-beta-2 glycoprotein I, the plan for confirmatory APS antibody testing and thrombophilia panel at 12 weeks, long-term management implications, and coordination plan with maternal-fetal medicine.

diagnostic_reports.type: anticardiolipin antibodies panel (IgG and IgM), repeat
diagnostic_reports.description: Repeat anticardiolipin antibodies (IgG and IgM) ordered for confirmatory APS testing. To be drawn on or after 2025-07-07 (12 weeks from initial positive on 2025-04-14). No results available at this encounter.

diagnostic_reports.type: lupus anticoagulant panel (dilute Russell viper venom time with mixing study), repeat
diagnostic_reports.description: Repeat lupus anticoagulant testing via dRVVT with confirmatory mixing study ordered for APS confirmation. To be drawn on or after 2025-07-07. No results available at this encounter.

diagnostic_reports.type: anti-beta-2 glycoprotein I antibodies panel (IgG and IgM), repeat
diagnostic_reports.description: Repeat anti-beta-2 glycoprotein I antibodies (IgG and IgM) ordered for APS confirmation. Borderline IgG on initial testing warrants repeat. To be drawn on or after 2025-07-07. No results available at this encounter.

Complete inherited thrombophilia screening panel ordered to rule out concurrent inherited thrombophilia. Includes Factor V Leiden mutation analysis, prothrombin gene mutation (G20210A) analysis, protein C activity, protein S activity (free and total), and antithrombin activity. To be drawn on or after 2025-07-07. No results available at this encounter.
